text.title: Interface Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying interface-analysis. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: Hardware or communication interface treated as system interface.
antipattern.fix: Always classify type first; spec attributes differ by class.
Block sign-off without error-handling section; it's the integration-failure surface.
Require source for volume; integrate with ops monitoring baseline.
Mandatory for PCI/HIPAA/GDPR data; reviewer blocks merge.
